# HANDOFF

## What this is
`parcels` — a CLI (`bin/parcel`) that packages a repo + agent session (claude/codex/pi/droid)
and ships it over Tailscale to another machine, where it resumes in tmux.

## Current task
This is the first end-to-end test: the parcels repo itself was shipped from the MacBook
along with the live Claude Code session that is building it.
